title: Solar Maintenance Guide
description: How to keep solar panels performing well over time.

sections.title: Monitoring
sections.content: Use your monitoring app to catch sudden production drops.

sections.title: Cleaning
sections.content: Rain often handles normal dust. Ask your installer before cleaning panels yourself.

sections.title: Service Records
sections.content: Keep warranty, inspection, and service documents for future buyers or repairs.

faqs.question: Do solar panels need frequent maintenance?
faqs.answer: Usually not, but monitoring and occasional inspection help catch issues early.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar homeowner resources
IRS residential clean energy credit guidance
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
